app.title: Show HN: Tolaria – Open-source macOS app to manage Markdown knowledge bases
app.author: lucaronin
proposed_tests: Create a knowledge base and insert new notes
Edit existing notes with Markdown formatting
Export the entire knowledge base to PDF/HTML
